notes: 排序重做:账号列表默认按订阅到期排列(最早到期的在最上,便于盯续费),另有「按周额度重置」「按周额度使用」两种排序可选,替代 0.1.4 的「按重置时间」;订阅距到期不足 3 天(或已过期)时,卡片上的「订阅至」日期会红字提醒。
notes_en: Sorting revamped: accounts are now ordered by subscription expiry by default (soonest first, handy for renewals), with "By weekly reset" and "By weekly usage" as alternatives — replacing 0.1.4's "By reset time". Subscription dates turn red when expiry is within 3 days (or already passed).
